org.docgene.model.globals

Class ArticlesGlossary.Letter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesGlossary.Letter
  • Enclosing class:
    ArticlesGlossary

    public static class ArticlesGlossary.Letter
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents one Letter in the glossary.
    Since:
    1.3
